title: Alag Alag
subTitle: A village belle marries an older doctor for his money, while singer Neeraj moves in with a movie starlet in the hope of getting more work. However, unexpected events occur and change their lives.

title: Awaara
subTitle: Born into poverty, Raj steals and works for a criminal gang in order to feed his mother. But when he meets and falls in love with his childhood friend, Rita, he vows to change his ways.

title: Biwi O Biwi
subTitle: To overcome with his love for Asha, singer Chandermohan masquerades as an army officer when her father, a retired military officer, refuses to let her marry a civilian.

title: Bhuvan Shome
subTitle: A lonely bureaucrat goes on holiday to a village in Gujarat where a young peasant woman helps him see beyond his job and develop a newfound empathy for people.

title: Piya Ka Ghar
subTitle: Malti falls in love with Ram and marries him without knowing what to expect. When she goes to his house, she realises that he is very poor and she is stuck with him for the rest of her life.

title: Do Raaste
subTitle: Navendu looks after his stepmother and half-brothers to fulfil the promise he has made to his father. However, their family falls apart after one of them marries a rich, controlling woman.

title: Aadmi Aur Insaan
subTitle: Jai and Munish fall for the same girl, ruining their bond with each other. However, an unfortunate turn of events reveals the true nature of their friendship.

title: Kalicharan
subTitle: When Prabhakar, an honest cop, is murdered by Din Dayal, a powerful crime lord, Khanna recruits his doppelganger Kalicharan to defeat Din Dayal.

title: Kabeela
subTitle: Shobha, a poor woman living with her widower father, falls in love with a gypsy named Mangal. However, other men who wish to be with her make her life difficult.

title: Kabeela
subTitle: Shobha, a poor woman living with her widower father, falls in love with a gypsy named Mangal. However, other men who wish to be with her make her life difficult.

title: Anari
subTitle: Rama, a simpleton, is appointed as the bodyguard of Rajnandini, a rich girl. She soon falls in love with him but her brothers' violent nature gets in the way of her uniting with Rama.

title: Videsh
subTitle: A drug lord escapes from India to Britain, assuming the identity of Swami Prem Babu to continue his illegal activities. When he learns that CBI Inspector Prasad Sinha is investigating him, he kidnaps Sinha's daughter.

title: My Life My Story
subTitle: The host invites prominent Bollywood celebrities who open up about their personal life and share interesting anecdotes based on their experiences.

title: Dulhan
subTitle: A girl is left distraught by the sudden death of her husband on their wedding night. However, things take a turn when a man resembling her husband arrives in the village.

title: Tamacha
subTitle: Raju and Vicky, two childhood friends, reunite after years apart. However, they end up on opposing sides of the law as Raju becomes a crusading officer, while Vicky descends into a life of crime.

title: Gunga Jumna
subTitle: Ganga perseveres in the village to make his brother a policeman in the city. However, circumstances cause Ganga to become a bandit while Jumna is compelled to convict him.

title: Sheshnaag
subTitle: Pritam and Banu, two shape-shifting snakes in human form, seek protection from a young man when an evil priest tries to hunt them down and use them in a ritual for wealth and immortality.

title: Ajay
subTitle: Manorama falls in love with Ajay, even though they come from different social backgrounds. They want to get married, but Manorama's uncles try their best to separate the happy couple.

title: Kundan
subTitle: Thakur Shamsher Singh, a wealthy criminal, tries to befriend a newly-appointed police officer in order to gain his favour, only to find out that the policeman is immune to his tactics.

title: Kundan
subTitle: Thakur Shamsher Singh, a wealthy criminal, tries to befriend a newly-appointed police officer in order to gain his favour, only to find out that the policeman is immune to his tactics.

title: Chehre Pe Chehra
subTitle: Dr Wilson, a scientist, develops a theory about humans having an angelic and a demonic side. He conducts an experiment on himself to prove it, but it goes terribly wrong, leading to dire consequences.

title: Jazbaat
subTitle: A woman's life takes an unexpected turn when she joins a dance troupe. However, complications arise when she returns to her village.

title: Kal Aaj Aur Kal
subTitle: Ram Bahadur Kapoor faces a dilemma when his son wants to marry for love, but his father insists on arranging the grandson's marriage.

title: Kala Dhanda Goray Log
subTitle: Framed for murder by a ruthless drug lord, Gauri Shankar loses everything. Years later, he resurfaces with a new persona and joins forces with a notorious gang to take down his enemies.

title: Padosan
subTitle: Bhola enlists the help of his musician friends to woo the girl next door, Bindu, by making her think he is a great singer. But when the ruse is eventually discovered, it threatens their relationship.

title: Pataal Bhairavi
subTitle: Ramu, a poor man, falls for a princess, but her father forbids the relation due to Ramu's poverty. Later, things take a turn for the worse when Ramu becomes rich, but it endangers his paramour.

title: Andha Kanoon
subTitle: Two siblings, Vijay and Durga, vow to avenge the death of their parents. So, Durga becomes an inspector to punish the criminals, whereas Vijay breaks the law to achieve his goal.

title: Mera Haque
subTitle: A young hooligan who looks exactly like a murdered prince is taken to the palace and made to impersonate him. Schemes, however, go sideways as the young man seems to have plans of his own.

title: Ardh Satya
subTitle: Anant, a righteous police officer, is torn between his ethics and dishonest practices in the police department. Soon, he discovers the strong connection between corruption and politics.
